title: Synthesized Fix Plan
description: Reconciled, conflict-free implementation plan for a single source file, produced by cross-principle synthesis.

file.description: Path to the source file these actions target

actions.description: Ordered list of fix suggestions to implement. Respects depends_on ordering.

suggestion_id.description: ID of the original fix suggestion (e.g., ocp-fix-001)

principle.description: Principle that authored this suggestion (e.g., OCP, LSP, SRP)

resolves.description: Finding IDs this action actually resolves (after conflict resolution)

todo_items.description: Concrete implementation steps, possibly amended by synthesis

depends_on.description: Suggestion IDs that must be implemented before this one

amended_todo_items.description: Additional todo items added by synthesis to integrate with other fixes

note.description: Explanation of any synthesis decisions affecting this action

unresolved.description: Finding IDs that no suggestion adequately resolves after synthesis

reason.description: Why this finding remains unresolved (e.g., requires cross-module changes)

conflicts_detected.description: Cross-principle conflicts found and how they were resolved

claimed_by.description: Suggestion IDs that claimed to resolve this finding

resolution.description: Which rule was applied and which suggestion won

relocation_detected.description: If applicable, describes how a fix relocated rather than eliminated the violation
